items.raw_excerpt: Meeting your in-laws for the first time is nerve-wracking in any country, but just so you're not taken by surprise: here's an informal set of rules and habits you may encounter if they're Swedish.
items.summary_en: Meeting your partner's Swedish parents can feel stressful for foreigners. This article shares simple cultural rules to follow during the visit. Following these tips will help you get invited back for another dinner.
items.summary_ko: 외국인이 스웨덴 장인어른을 처음 만나면 긴장될 수 있습니다. 몇 가지 문화적 예절을 지키면 다시 초대받을 수 있습니다. 이 기사는 스웨덴 집안 예절에 대한 실용적인 팁을 알려줍니다.
items.title_en: How to visit your Swedish in-laws without making mistakes
items.title_original: How to make sure you don't offend your Swedish in-laws

items.raw_excerpt: Difficult immigration departments, tricky paperwork and language barriers: getting a residence permit in Austria is a feat for many foreigners. We've compiled readers' advice on how to navigate the system.
items.summary_en: Getting a residence permit in Austria can be difficult due to paperwork and language barriers. This article compiles advice from readers on how to navigate the system.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아에서 거주 허가를 받는 것은 서류와 언어 장벽 때문에 어려울 수 있습니다. 이 기사는 시스템을 이해하는 데 도움이 되는 독자들의 조언을 모았습니다.
items.title_en: Learn German: The best advice to get a residence permit in Austria
items.title_ko: 독일어를 배워라: 오스트리아 거주 허가를 얻는 최고의 조언
items.title_original: 'Learn German': The best advice to get a residence permit in Austria

items.raw_excerpt: July 22 : International Team captain Geoff Ogilvy announced on Wednesday that 2008 Masters champion Trevor Immelman will return as one of his assistants for this year's Presidents Cup showdown against the United States at Medinah Country ​Club outside Chicago.• Immelman previously served as a captain’s
items.summary_en: 2008 Masters champion Trevor Immelman will serve as an assistant captain for the International Team at this year's Presidents Cup. The event will be held at Medinah Country Club outside Chicago, Illinois.
items.summary_ko: 2008년 마스터스 챔피언 트레버 임멜먼이 올해 프레지던스컵에서 국제팀 어시스턴트 캡틴으로 활동한다. 대회는 일리노이주 시카고 외곽의 메디나 컨트리클럽에서 열린다.
items.title_en: Immelman named International Team assistant for Presidents Cup
items.title_ko: 임멜먼, 프레지던스컵 국제팀 어시스턴트 캡틴으로 선임
items.title_original: Immelman named International Team assistant for Presidents Cup

items.raw_excerpt: 'The root cause is climate change. It's only going to continue to get worse,' says environmental scientist who urges local residents to lobby all levels of government
items.summary_en: An environmental scientist says climate change is the root cause of worsening wildfire seasons in Ontario. Local residents are being urged to push all levels of government for better forest management. The debate includes controversial herbicide spraying to protect forests.
items.summary_ko: 환경과학자가 온타리오 악화되는 산불 시즌의 근본 원인은 기후변화라고 지적했다. 지역 주민들은 각급 정부에 더 나은 산림 관리를 요구하라는 권고를 받고 있다. 제초제 살포를 포함한 관리 방식을 두고 논쟁이 이어지고 있다.
items.title_en: Forest management debate heats up as wildfires worsen in Ontario
items.title_ko: 온타리오 산불 악화 속 산림 관리 논쟁
items.title_original: Debate over forest management rages amid wildfire surge - Village Report

items.raw_excerpt: Summer in Sweden is special: on that our readers are agreed. They praised the days that stretch past 10pm, the natural, uncrowded beaches and lakes, berries, both wild and cultivated, and locals who are suddenly carefree and smiling.
items.summary_en: Swedish readers agree that summer in their country is special. They love the long days that stretch past 10pm, natural uncrowded beaches and lakes, and fresh berries. Locals become more carefree and smile more during the warm season.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 독자들은 자국의 여름이 특별하다고 입을 모읍니다. 저녁 10시가 넘어서도 해가 지지 않는 긴 낮, 한적한 자연 해변과 호수, 그리고 신선한 열매를 사랑합니다. 따뜻한 계절이 되면 현지인들은 더 여유로워지고 미소가 많아집니다.
items.title_en: The Best Things About Spending Summer in Sweden
items.title_original: 'On a sunny day, it can't be beat': The best things about spending summer in Sweden

items.raw_excerpt: If you're visiting Berlin Pride for the first time, you'll probably want to see the parade – and you should – but there's much more to experience. Here's our guide to making the most of the celebrations this weekend.
items.summary_en: Berlin Pride is happening this weekend with a parade and many other events. This guide helps first-time visitors enjoy all the celebrations. Find tips for making the most of the festivities.
items.summary_ko: 이번 주말 베를린에서 프라이드 퍼레이드와 다양한 행사가 열립니다. 이 가이드는 첫 방문자들이 모든 축제를 즐기는 데 도움을 줍니다. 축제를 제대로 즐기는 팁을 확인하세요.
items.title_en: The Ultimate Guide to Berlin Pride 2026
items.title_original: The ultimate guide to making the most of Berlin Pride 2026

items.raw_excerpt: A housing association writes to residents after receiving a complaint about noise.
items.summary_en: A housing association writes to residents after receiving a noise complaint about children playing outside.
items.summary_ko: 주택 관리 협회가 아이 놀음 소리에 대한 민원을 접수한 후 주민들에게 편지를 보냈습니다.
items.title_en: Parents decry 'absurd' noise complaint over calling in playing kids
items.title_ko: 부모들, 뛰노는 아이들의 소리에 대한 '황당한' 소음 민원 비판
items.title_original: Parents decry 'absurd' noise complaint over calling in playing kids

items.raw_excerpt: Sometimes you will take a prescription to a French pharmacy only to be told that it is 'not reimbursed' - here's a look at what this means, why it happens and what you can do about it.
items.summary_en: In France, patients sometimes find that a prescription medicine is not reimbursed by the health system. This happens when a drug is not approved for coverage or is used outside official guidelines. Patients can ask their doctor for an alternative or request a special reimbursement application.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스에서는 일부 처방약이 건강보험 적용 대상이 아닌 경우 환자가 전액 부담해야 한다. 이는 약이 보험 목록에 포함되지 않거나 공식 지침 밖에 사용될 때 발생한다. 환자는 대체 약 처방을 요청하거나 특별 상환 신청을 할 수 있다.
items.title_en: Why some drugs are not covered in France and what to do
items.title_ko: 프랑스에서 약값을 돌려받지 못하는 이유와 해결 방법
items.title_original: EXPLAINED: Why are some medication not reimbursed in France and what you can do about it

items.raw_excerpt: More than just a popular attraction in Puerto Vallarta, the Vallarta Botanical Gardens help to conserve regional flora and fauna.
items.summary_en: The Vallarta Botanical Gardens in Puerto Vallarta help conserve regional flora and fauna. The gardens are more than just a popular tourist attraction.
items.summary_ko: 푸에르토 발라타에 위치한 발라타 식물원은 지역 생태계 보존에 도움을 주고 있다. 이 식물원은 단순한 관광 명소가 아니라 생태 보전에 기여하는 곳이다.
items.title_en: New annual report highlights Vallarta Botanical Gardens' expanding conservation mission
items.title_ko: 발라타 식물원, 보존 역할 확대 보고서 발표
items.title_original: MND Local: New annual report highlights Vallarta Botanical Gardens’ expanding conservation mission

items.raw_excerpt: Infraestruturas de Portugal stated that repairs to the IP3 road surface are expected to continue “for several days,” following the resin spill that forced the road closure in Penacova on 20 July.
items.summary_en: Repairs to the IP3 road surface in Penacova, Portugal are expected to continue for several days. The road was closed on July 20 after a resin spill damaged the highway. Infraestruturas de Portugal says the closure will last until the repairs are complete.
items.summary_ko: 포르투갈 페나코바의 IP3 도로 복구 작업이 며칠간 더 이어질 예정입니다. 7월 20일 수지 유출 사고로 도로가 폐쇄되었으며, 복구 완료까지 폐쇄가 유지됩니다.
items.title_en: Repairs to the IP3 highway in Penacova are expected to keep the road closed for several days
items.title_ko: 페나코바 IP3 고속도로 복구로 도로 폐쇄 수일간 계속
items.title_original: Repairs to the IP3 highway in Penacova are expected to keep the road closed for several days
